title: Earnings Volatility Watch: These 10 Stocks Could Swing 30% Or More This Week
author: Piero Cingari
description: Options markets are pricing in elevated post-earnings volatility for 10 stocks reporting this week, with implied moves of 30% or more. The list is dominated by regional banks, with Capitol Federal Financial topping the list. The Federal Reserve's policy decision on Wednesday is expected to magnify price swings.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock is highlighted as having the highest expected volatility (30%+ implied move) ahead of earnings, indicating significant uncertainty but no directional bias
